segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: Okay Marcus, let's start. How is the left trap feeling today compared to last week?

segments.speaker: marcus
segments.text: Honestly, it's worse. Like, a lot worse. Sleeping on my left side is basically impossible right now.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: I saw that in your HRV data. It's been trending down for about two weeks straight.

segments.speaker: marcus
segments.text: Yeah, and sleep has been rough too. I've been waking up at like three AM and can't get back down.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: That tracks. We're going to use the Sun pad on the left side today, forty hertz sweep.

segments.speaker: marcus
segments.text: Oh, that's the one you used last time that actually helped. The one that warmed up kind of slowly.

segments.speaker: marcus
segments.text: I can already feel it. Way different from last time on the right side. The left responds faster.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: Good. Your heart rate is already dropping. Down eight beats from when we started.

segments.speaker: marcus
segments.text: Hm. My resting HR has been way up since the half marathon last month. Like, it just hasn't come down.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: That's a recovery signal we need to watch. The parasympathetic sequence should help.

segments.speaker: marcus
segments.text: I just want to get back to where I was in February. That was my best stretch of training in years.
